title: The Revolt of the Bagran Troops against al -Hajjaj
description: According to Hisham-Abu Mikhnaf-Abu Zuhayr al-'Abel: AlHajjaj b. Yusuf left al-KUfah immediately after arriving and having Ibn Qibi' executed, and went on to al-Bagrah. There he gave an oration like the one he had given to the Kufans, threatening them in the same way. A man of the Banu Yashkurlm was brought to him, accused of desertion. The man said, "I have a hernia, and Bishr saw it and exempted me; and you will find that my stipend has been returned to the treasury." But al-Hajjaj did not accept his excuse and had him killed.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 22
